title: Zombie Crawler
description: A crawling zombie variant, based off of a vanilla zombie.
body:
**Discontinued please use:**

[https://modrinth.com/mod/devyrs-zombies](https://modrinth.com/mod/devyrs-zombies)



**Zombie Crawler**

A zombie, just missing some legs.

Zombie differences:
- slower than a vanilla zombie
- less health than a vanilla zombie

no other differences other than being a crawler.

allowed in modpacks, with credits.
no reuploading anywhere.


Made in MCreator.
